title: Better Weather+ (with pmweather)
description: Better weather+ adds more weather relying on pmweather to run and a tempature mod it is the newest addition to PMWeather modpacks
body: Better weather+ is the 1.1.0 version of more Weather+ with tempature mods to add realism and PMweather for well DUH better wethaer if the game is laggy allocate 8 to 10 gigs to the game **THIS MODPACK WILL NOT RUN ON POTATO PCS ALSO SHADERS ARE NOT COMPATIBLE IF YOU WANT BETTER VISUALS DOWNLOAD IRIS AND GO TO THIS LINK** [Shaders plus for pmweather](https://github.com/Psychoosm/ShadersPlusforProtomanlysWeatherMod) once this link is typed in download the .zip file and put it in the shaders folder
